_comment: Curated Q/A pairs for ez-rag benchmark. 'gold_substrings' are case-insensitive substrings that any correct answer must contain; 'gold_doc_id' identifies the corpus document the answer should come from.

questions.question: Who are the authors of the paper 'Attention Is All You Need'?
What is the model architecture proposed in 'Attention Is All You Need'?
What two pre-training tasks does BERT use?
In the original RAG paper, what are the two main RAG variants introduced?
What retriever does the original RAG paper use?
According to Wikipedia, what does 'retrieval-augmented generation' do?
What is the opening sentence of 'Pride and Prejudice'?
How many articles does the US Constitution have?
What is the standard deduction concept described in IRS Form 1040 instructions?
According to the Wikipedia article, what is a Transformer in deep learning?
What text appears in the synthetic screenshot used to test OCR?
